assumptions: The concept targets businesses in Suriname unless a narrower audience is supplied.
Placement dimensions, safe areas, eligibility, and overlays require current platform preview before publication.
Exact copy and the official Zenta logo will be added during final design production, not image prompting.

campaign.audience: small-business advertisers who want expert feedback without granting ad-account access

creative_strategy.audience_insight: A viewer may notice an ad while still missing the offer, relevance, or next action.
creative_strategy.message_angle: The review separates visual attention from message understanding.
creative_strategy.hypothesis: A shelf where only the essential message objects remain visible will make clarity review tangible without declaring a universal time rule.

format.crop_guidance: Keep the focal subject and reserved copy area inside the central composition with generous edge clearance.

visual_direction.subject: a fast-moving editorial display shelf containing competing ad-message objects
visual_direction.action: motion blur falls away from three essential objects representing audience, offer, and action
visual_direction.environment: a black gallery display with physical graphic objects and no screen
visual_direction.composition: motion enters from left, three clear objects settle on right, headline space above
visual_direction.lighting: high-speed studio flash with lime focus accents and restrained cyan trails
visual_direction.style: kinetic product editorial photography with controlled motion and sharp hierarchy

copy.caption: Getting noticed and being understood are different creative jobs. A public ads review checks the visible offer, CTA, creative, and landing-page consistency.

image_prompt: Create a polished 4:5 base image concept for a Zenta Creative paid ad image. The central subject is a fast-moving editorial display shelf containing competing ad-message objects. Show motion blur falls away from three essential objects representing audience, offer, and action. Set the scene in a black gallery display with physical graphic objects and no screen. Composition: motion enters from left, three clear objects settle on right, headline space above. Lighting: high-speed studio flash with lime focus accents and restrained cyan trails. Visual style: kinetic product editorial photography with controlled motion and sharp hierarchy. Use Zenta's near-black foundation with the controlled palette #030507, #F4F7FB, #B9FF66, #5EE7FF, #9B7CFF; keep lime as the decisive action accent rather than flooding the image with one hue. The image must communicate the strategic angle 'The review separates visual attention from message understanding.' without claiming a result. Reserve clean, high-contrast negative space for the headline 'What survives the first glance?', support line '$49 Public Ads Review', and CTA 'Request your ads snapshot' to be typeset later by a designer. Do not render any words, letters, prices, logo, wordmark, platform mark, interface copy, or functional QR code inside the base image. Keep the focal subject and copy-safe space comfortably away from edges for placement preview. Avoid stopwatch claims, social-feed screenshots, attention-score meters or fake eye-tracking heatmaps, fake evidence, visual clutter, and distorted objects or anatomy.
negative_constraints: no generated logo, wordmark, trademark, or third-party platform branding
no fabricated metrics, rankings, leads, revenue, testimonials, or guarantees
no copied Google, Meta, Facebook, Instagram, or WhatsApp interface
no tiny unreadable text, random letters, watermark, or signature
no stereotypes, unapproved likenesses, or identifiable private customer data
stopwatch claims, social-feed screenshots, attention-score meters or fake eye-tracking heatmaps

accessibility.alt_text: A moving display resolves into three clear objects representing audience, offer, and action.
accessibility.contrast_note: Typeset final copy in white or near-black on a solid high-contrast area and verify readability at mobile size.

required_review: Verify the $49 price and public-review scope against the live Zenta website.
Confirm the base image contains no generated branding, fake proof, copied platform trade dress, or private data.
Preview final typography, logo placement, crop, and overlays in every intended placement.

production.typography_instruction: Add the exact overlay copy later using Zenta's bold modern geometric sans-serif system; do not ask an image model to typeset it.
production.logo_instruction: Reserve space for the approved Zenta logo and place the original brand asset only during final design production.
